subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and firm in the Testament, render thanks unto the Self-Subsisting Lord, that thou hast attained unto the sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و راسخ بر میثاق شکر کن حضرت قیومرا که باستان مقدس فائز گشتی و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @personal instructions, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
